You, In Every Frame
Hover to pause · Each moment, priceless 💗
Our Story 📸
Every photo, a chapter I never want to end
4 Gifts From My Heart 🎁
Wrapped in love, sealed with forever 💌
Gift 01 🎀 💌
A Promise

I promise to always be your safe place — the one who holds your hand when skies get grey, wipes your tears before you even ask, and stays by your side no matter what life throws our way. You will never face anything alone.

Gift 02 🎀 🌙
A Thousand Nights

Every late night we talked until the world went quiet. Every goodnight that secretly meant I don't want this to end. Those moments are my most treasured — and I want a thousand more of them, with you, only you.

Gift 03 🎀 🌸
My Heart, Fully

You didn't just take a piece of my heart — you took the whole thing, rearranged it, and made it better than it ever was. Every beat is yours. Happy birthday, my favourite person in the world. I love you more than words can carry.

Gift 04 🎀 ✨
All Our Tomorrows

The best gift isn't wrapped in a bow — it's every tomorrow that I get to spend making you smile, surprising you, growing with you. Here's to a lifetime of adventures, laughter, and loving you deeper every single day.

A Note For You 💗
Written from the deepest corner of my heart

Rani, the day you came into my life, something shifted — like the universe finally exhaled. You have this rare, magical way of making everything feel warmer, brighter, and more alive. Your laugh is my favourite song. Your smile is the best thing I have ever seen.

I don't know what I did to deserve someone like you, but whatever it was, I'd do it a million times over. On your birthday, I want you to feel every bit as special, loved, and celebrated as you make me feel every single day.

Happy Birthday, my Rani. I love you — yesterday, today, and every day to come. 🌹

— Forever yours, Rohan 💕
Happy Birthday Rani 🎂
